Smooth particle-to-solid text transition on canvas

Particles gradually fill into solid text naturally on the canvas itself,
no jarring crossfade to HTML. Solid text fades in underneath particles

and particles explode. Button is now a normal styled white button.

commit.message:
test: configure test isolation and parallel execution (#1016)

## Summary

Configure explicit test isolation and parallel execution for xUnit
tests.

## Changes

- **xunit.runner.json**: New configuration file enabling parallel
assembly and collection execution with aggressive algorithm and
unlimited threads
- **test.runsettings**: Added `MaxCpuCount=0` to use all available CPU
cores for parallel test execution
- **Tests.props**: Include xunit.runner.json in all test project outputs

## Context

The project already references `Meziantou.Xunit.ParallelTestFramework`
but lacked explicit parallel execution configuration. These changes
enable:
- **Assembly-level parallelization**: Multiple test assemblies run
concurrently
- **Collection-level parallelization**: Test collections within
assemblies run concurrently
- **CPU utilization**: All available processors are used
(`MaxCpuCount=0`)
- **Aggressive scheduling**: The aggressive parallel algorithm maximizes
throughput

All 2829 tests continue to pass with these changes.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai
-->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Tests**
* Enabled parallel test execution across assemblies and test collections
for improved performance.
* Configured test execution to utilize all available CPU cores for more
aggressive parallelization.
* Ensured the test-runner configuration file is included with test
project outputs so runner settings are available at runtime.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

---------

commit.message:
fix: corregir error de escala en business_model generado por IA

Root cause: template usaba params.get('volumen_mensual', 1000) con
variables que ya son totales mensuales → resultado * 1000 = cifras imposibles

Fix 1: template del business_model usa totales directamente sin multiplicar
Fix 2: instruccion explicita en prompt sobre escala de variables
Fix 3: sanity check en monte_carlo_engine si mean > 1B
Fix 4: warning visible en dashboard cuando resultados son claramente erroneos

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(skill): guide bot to offer fix commits when inline suggestions are impossible (#1342)

## Summary

- The review-pr skill told the bot to "add inline suggestions fixing
each occurrence" when finding the same pattern in other files, but
GitHub's review API only allows inline comments on lines in the diff
- When the bot reviewed #1336 (which only changed `flake.nix`), it found
`pkgs.system` in `nix/home-manager-module.nix` too — but couldn't post
an inline suggestion because that file wasn't in the diff, so it fell
back to a code block in the review body
- Updated the skill to: (1) explain the API limitation, (2) prefer
pushing a fix commit when possible, (3) when a commit isn't appropriate,
clearly describe the fix and explain why an inline suggestion isn't
available

## Test plan

- [ ] Review the skill wording for clarity
- [ ] Verify the bot uses the updated guidance on a future PR with
out-of-diff suggestions

Closes #1341

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

fix: remove KV reads from API — KV is write-only from API side

API cache_get now reads L0 memory → Redis only. KV is never read by
the API — it is written to so CF Workers can serve edge-cached responses,
but the API has no business reading it back. This eliminates all KV
429 rate limit errors on startup bursts.

commit.message:
fix: popup closes 1.5s after marker tap + single-space zoom on tablet

Root cause: _applyMarkerHoverHandlers used mouseover/mouseout which fire
on touch via simulation. isHovering stayed true (no mouseout), stickyTimeout
at 1500ms called setStickyPopup → clearStickyPopup → closed own popup.
Same stickyTimeout called navigateToLocations → hashchange → zoomToLocations
→ setView zoom 15 on tablet (guard was <= 767, not touch-aware).

- map.js: skip hover handlers entirely on touch devices
- routing.js: zoomToLocations guards with ontouchstart (covers tablets too)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: cli release packaging (#105)

* feat: add normalized chat feed and executor seam

* feat: Rust backend + Bun dashboard rewrite

Rust backend (43 files, 4,086 lines):
- 7 crates: core, db, server, executors, watcher, git, cli
- Board parser: Obsidian Kanban markdown with roundtrip fidelity
- Dispatcher: auto-dispatch from Ready column with agent tags
- Spawn limiter: 5 global + 2 per-project concurrency
- 9 executors: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Amp, Cursor, OpenCode, Droid, Qwen, Copilot
- SQLite (WAL), SSE events, webhook HMAC-SHA256
- 6.7MB binary, 195ms startup

Bun dashboard (10 files, 505 lines):
- React 19 + Tailwind v4 + Vite
- Real-time status, sessions, projects, executors, event feed

10 tests passing.

* fix: remove duplicate dashboard, keep existing packages/web

* perf: switch runtime from Node.js to Bun

Benchmarks (same codebase, just runtime swap):
- CLI startup (co --help): 66ms vs 147ms (2.2x faster)
- co doctor: 106ms vs 325ms (3x faster)
- Tests: 194ms/43 tests vs 808ms/22 tests (4x faster, finds more tests)
- Core build: 625ms vs 865ms (1.4x faster)
- Dashboard ready: 113ms

Changes:
- Shebang: #!/usr/bin/env bun (was node)
- LaunchAgent: uses bun binary path
- Fix type errors: DashboardRole 'editor' -> 'operator', null vs undefined
- Fix react-markdown v10 incompatibility (downpin to v9)
- Add missing remark-gfm dependency
- Add ChatPanelProps.agentName

* chore: add .playwright-cli to gitignore and commit Cargo.lock

user-defined extra origins. Make AppState::new async for tokio-based
session loading.

* fix: resolve TOCTOU races and concurrency issues in session management

- Move is_live check after sessions write lock in append_and_apply
- Reorder send_to_session to persist before sending input
- Use drain() instead of full buffer copy in append_output
- Use safe session_id slicing with get().unwrap_or()
- Replace can_spawn with atomic acquire in drain_ready
- Add child.wait() after kill() to prevent zombie processes
- Cap merge_assistant_fragment contains check to last 512 bytes
- Make load_sessions_from_disk fully async with tokio::fs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: update state layer, executors, and watcher for async I/O

Async AppState init, executor process management improvements including
zombie process reaping, PTY poll interval tuning (500ms), and
tokio::fs migration in file watcher. Update agent executor
implementations and CLI entry point.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: migrate frontend API layer to Rust backend proxy

Remove all 31 Next.js API route handlers and route requests directly
to the Rust backend via proxy.ts. Keeps only the agents route for
binary path validation with isSafeBinary using path.basename.

services.ts (superseded by Rust backend). Add agentUtils.ts with
shared formatCurrentModelLabel and normalizeAgentName. Add liveEvents.ts
for SSE snapshot subscription. Fix getAttentionLevel errored status
contradiction and parseCost zero-value handling with nullish coalescing.

double cast in session type alignment, and add anti-FOUT comment
to layout.tsx theme script.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): migrate CI and release workflows from pnpm to bun

- CI: split into parallel Rust (check, clippy, test) and Frontend
  (typecheck, build) jobs using bun + dtolnay/rust-toolchain
- Release: replace pnpm with bun install, add Rust build/test steps,
  use npm pack directly instead of missing release:pack script,
  add Cargo caching for faster builds
- Both: update actions to v4, remove pnpm/action-setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): migrate security and codeql workflows from pnpm to bun

Replace pnpm/action-setup with oven-sh/setup-bun in security audit
workflow. Fix actions/checkout and codeql-action to valid versions
(v4 and v3 respectively).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): build workspace deps in dependency order before typecheck

Core and plugins must be built before CLI typecheck can resolve
workspace:* imports. Reorder CI to: build (core → plugins → cli → web)
then typecheck, instead of typecheck-first which fails on missing
dist/ directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: auto-release on merge to main with conventional commit versioning

- Trigger release on push to main (replaces manual workflow_dispatch-only)
- Auto-detect version bump from conventional commits (feat→minor, fix→patch, feat!→major)
- Keep workflow_dispatch as manual override for explicit version type
- Skip bot release commits to prevent infinite loops
- Only create tags (no push to protected main branch)
- Add idempotency: skip if tag or npm version already exists
- Set cancel-in-progress: false to prevent interrupted releases
- Add required CI status checks to branch protection (Rust + Frontend)

commit.message:
Fix Hide Offline button click blocked by drag handle overlay

The layout manager's drag handle mousedown creates a z-index:9999
fullscreen overlay that intercepts mouseup, preventing the click
event from ever firing on the button. Added mousedown stopPropagation
on the button. Also added string fallbacks for Twitch Player event
constants and extra play/isPaused detection for stream online status.

test: add 24 integration tests across 5 new test files

  sensor triggers, WS CRUD round-trip, notification transitions,
  restart burst suppression, budget alerts, multi-object statistics)
- test_restart_resilience: store persistence across reload, notification
  state reset, trigger state survival, _previous_statuses seeding
- test_concurrent_operations: rapid multi-task completion, store delay
  save coalescing, create+delete race
- test_error_recovery: notify service unavailable, entity disappears,
  entity unavailable, store missing on reload, calendar with no tasks,

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: token-budget context window with API-precision and model registry

Replace message-count sliding window with pure token-budget selection.
Each message stores its token count in the DB; budget defaults to 100k
tokens and is resolved via ModelConfig.contextBudget → ModelRegistry →
config.context.defaultBudgetTokens fallback chain.

Token precision: tool result tokens are corrected using promptTokens
delta between consecutive LLM calls; user message tokens are corrected
after the first LLM response. Assistant/tool_call tokens use API-reported
completionTokens directly.

Add built-in ModelRegistry (model-registry.json) with GLM model
capabilities (context length, max output, modality support). JVM loads
from classpath; Native uses a Gradle-generated string constant.

/status command now shows context token usage (used/budget with %).

commit.message:
Vector SVG outline overlay: smooth, resolution-independent region boundaries

- Replace canvas-based pixel outline with SVG overlay not subject to CSS transform
- Trace pixel boundary edges into connected chains via adjacency graph
- Douglas-Peucker simplification with zoom-adaptive epsilon (fewer points at low zoom)
- Catmull-Rom → cubic Bezier smoothing for short segments; straight lines for long ones
- Viewport culling with precomputed bounding boxes (~60x speedup at max zoom)
- Stroke width scales with zoom level (1px at zoom=1, 8px at zoom=8)
- rAF throttle prevents resize choppiness

fix: add L0 process-level cache to stop KV 429 rate limit errors

- Add 30s in-memory L0 cache layer in storage.py (per Gunicorn worker)
  absorbs burst traffic before hitting Redis or Cloudflare KV
- cache_get: L0 → Redis → KV (was: Redis → KV)
- cache_set: writes all three layers
- Fix list_countries to use cache_get/cache_set instead of kv_json_get
  directly — was bypassing Redis entirely on every request
